title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
company: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions!
